request: Rewrite CLAUDE.md to act primarily as a pointer to .claude/CONSTITUTION.md: decide which binding rules must stay always-loaded in CLAUDE.md vs which move to the on-demand annex (no byte cap), and spend reclaimed CLAUDE.md budget on quick-reference cards (e.g. a memory-system cheat sheet). seed.md-architecture amendment per Art I.4 — seed.md changes first, then CLAUDE.md + src/CLAUDE.template.md mirror.
